name: compliance fetch: per §2.19 plugin-internal fields, fetch records edition + edition_date (e.g. NIST CSF 2.0 vs 1.1)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-cache && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/fetcher.sh" --framework-id nist-csf-2 --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" --emit-metadata "$PWD/meta.json" && grep -E "edition" meta.json 1>&2 && grep -E "edition_date" meta.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
printf '#!/bin/bash
echo NIST CSF 2.0 published 2024-02-26
exit 0
' > upstream.sh && chmod +x upstream.sh
